---
name: "Trich Xuat The Tri Thuc Giam Dinh"
description: "Dung khi can bien mot tai lieu, rule, ca audit, hoac mo ta nghiep vu thanh the tri thuc gon, co dieu kien ap dung, ngoai le, du lieu can kiem tra, va cach test lai de huan luyen AI giams dinh BHYT."
argument-hint: "Nhap tai lieu, file rule, log audit, ca ho so, hoac mo ta nghiep vu can chuan hoa"
agent: "CDSS BHYT Agent"
model: "GPT-5 (copilot)"
tools: [read, search, edit]
---

Hay trich xuat noi dung dau vao thanh mot the tri thuc giams dinh BHYT co cau truc ro rang.

Yeu cau:

1. Khong viet lai dai dong; phai chuan hoa thanh tri thuc dung de huan luyen AI.
2. Tach ro quy tac chinh, dieu kien ap dung, ngoai le, du lieu can kiem tra, va cach test lai.
3. Neu thong tin chua du, ghi ro phan nao can xac minh them.
4. Uu tien ngan gon, co cau truc, co gia tri tai su dung.

Su dung mau the tri thuc trong [tai_lieu/Mau_the_tri_thuc_giam_dinh_BHYT.md](../../tai_lieu/Mau_the_tri_thuc_giam_dinh_BHYT.md) neu phu hop.
